basicInfo.name: Nightmare Shane
basicInfo.flavor: Shane almost lost her body to the demon when her powers went berserk, but she was able to seal it just in time. She carries the seal everywhere with her, just to be safe.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Demon Slaying
Skill 2.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 1500% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict 3 Buff Removal(s).
 - Activates again up to 1 time(s) with 100% power upon defeating an enemy with this skill.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 1500% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Demonic Power
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 5 Hit(s)]
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 25 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - Grants Skill Cooldown Reset when an enemy falls in battle.

profile.story:
Before Shane became a demon hunter, she lived a quiet life in a small rural village.
Her peaceful days came to an end without warning when demons attacked.
Her father died fighting alongside other villagers, and her mother, clutching a kitchen knife, went out to find her little brother, who had wandered off to feed a stray cat. She never returned.
By morning, her brother called from outside the house.
Scared, cold, and begging to be let inside.
But Shane couldn't move.
Her brother had been unable to speak since birth.
At that critical moment, a massive sword came from nowhere, slaying the demon impersonating her brother.
That was her first encounter with Sieg.
Though Shane survived, she had lost everything.
Following Sieg to join the Holy Cross Crusaders, she volunteered for an experiment to accept demonic power into her body, driven by her desire for vengeance.
